name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity reports the audited spec count in the specs_audited=<N> line on a clean audit
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf 'F-4 minimal\n' > arch/a.md && for i in 1 2 3; do printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"echo ok","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > "pending/F-4-x/c${i}.json"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'specs_audited=3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
